title: Coordinating Care for Senior Veterans and Wounded Warriors Act
short_title: Coordinating Care for Senior Veterans and Wounded Warriors Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
crs_summary: Coordinating Care for Senior Veterans and Wounded Warriors Act This bill requires the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to implement a three-year pilot program to coordinate, navigate, and manage care and benefits for veterans who are enrolled in both the Medicare program and the VA health care system.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
